response.justification: Candidate is an experienced full-stack/web developer with strong JavaScript/TypeScript and DLang background, but the role requires native-level Japanese proficiency, deep C programming for UNIX, Linux kernel modification experience, and embedded networking/security domain knowledge (MACsec, 802.1X, L2/L3 switching). The resume shows no Japanese language ability, no embedded firmware experience, no switch/networking security work, and only brief C/C++ exposure at National Instruments a decade ago. Core hard requirements are not met.
strengths: Long software engineering career with diverse stack exposure
Some past C/C++ experience at National Instruments on a developer-tools product
Strong testing/TDD discipline and developer-tooling mindset
concerns: No Japanese language proficiency listed (hard requirement is native-level)
No embedded firmware, Linux kernel modification, or LAN-switch experience
No demonstrated security/networking expertise (MACsec, 802.1X, L2/L3, NETCONF, SNMP)
